Game.Name: Kikuni Masahiko no Jantoushi Doraou 2 (Japan)
Game.plot: Overview:Kikuni Masahiko no Jantoushi Dora Ou 2 ("Masahiko Kikuni's Jantoushi Dora Ou 2") is a mahjong game with a parody supernatural superhero theme. Like its predecessor, it uses mahjong as a sort of component for its "battle" system.Kikuni Masahiko no Jantoushi Dora Ou 2 is a bit more "free", allowing the player to explore the world map. It also allows for four-person games, removing the two-person limitation of its forebear.
Game.Notes: Kikuni Masahiko no Jantoushi Dora Ou 2 ("Masahiko Kikuni's Jantoushi Dora Ou 2") is a mahjong game with a parody supernatural superhero theme. Like its predecessor, it uses mahjong as a sort of component for its "battle" system. Kikuni Masahiko no Jantoushi Dora Ou 2 is a bit more "free", allowing the player to explore the world map. It also allows for four-person games, removing the two-person limitation of its forebear.
